info.title: BackendToolkit API
info.description: Production-ready Node.js backend toolkit with advanced features. Complete API with authentication, payments, monitoring, and comprehensive documentation.

get.description: Action/resource counts and trends

Retrieve a single audit log entry.

**Parameter:** Use the `logId` field from the list endpoint (or `_id`, they're the same)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Audit log ID (use logId from /audit list response)

_id.description: MongoDB document ID and unique audit log identifier

logId.description: Explicit audit log ID (same as _id, convenient for API calls)
